race.comment: DIDN'T MISS MANY (3) is another in fine form, off a short let up for this having tried hard at Sandown Lakeside when beaten a long neck. He's another drawn very wide for the 3kg claimer but he does have early speed to offset that and will take catching. WHERE'S MY SOCK (12) has won two of her past three, far too good at Swan Hill latest. Bit more depth here but she should get a nice enough run and measure up. DEADLY PRESS (7) comes here off a short break but was around the mark prior to the freshen. Has run well on a heavy deck previously and he creates plenty of interest. CAPRICORN STAR (4) has shown she loves a wet track previously and has strong claims if she's ready to fire first-up.
